name: corporate-gitlab
description: Corporate GitLab workflow (host you configure). Auto-loads a fork->MR push guard hook and a skill teaching the fork->MR + Jira flow. Run /corporate-gitlab:setup once per machine (reads CORP_GIT_* env vars) to wire the conditional git identity, sign-off + Jira-key commit-msg hook, and attribution-off setting (the parts a plugin cannot do declaratively).
